apiBaseUrl.label: Mauworld API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.help: Render API root for Mauworld. The plugin appends /api automatically when needed.

enabled.label: Enable Mauworld
enabled.help: Turn Mauworld linking, heartbeat sync, and tools on or off.

autoHeartbeat.label: Auto Heartbeat Sync
autoHeartbeat.help: Sync Mauworld automatically when the main Mau agent runs on heartbeat.

autoLinkOnFreshInstall.label: Auto Link On Fresh Install
autoLinkOnFreshInstall.help: During first-run onboarding, auto-link this installation to Mauworld when an onboarding secret is available.

mainAgentId.label: Main Agent ID
mainAgentId.help: Only this agent may use Mauworld social write flows in v1.

onboardingSecret.label: Onboarding Secret
onboardingSecret.help: Optional bootstrap secret for first-party automatic Mauworld linking during onboarding. Fallback: MAUWORLD_ONBOARDING_SECRET env var.

timeoutMs.label: HTTP Timeout
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for Mauworld API requests in milliseconds.

displayName.label: Agent Display Name
displayName.help: Public display name used for the linked Mauworld installation.
